name: DynaStash XL ER
summary: Designed for use with all XL and XLS units, the DynaStash XL ER offers effortless portability and flawless function to DynaVap vaporiser users.
description: Designed for use with all XL and XLS units, the DynaStash XL ER offers effortless portability and flawless function to DynaVap vaporiser users. It's a top choice for vape storage and provides the best mobile experience for any 109mm DynaVap model with its circular cut-out and silicone container for storing additional items. All XL & XLS (109mm) DynaVap Vaporisers This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer. Keeps prescribed flower at its best for longer.
